services.title: Professional Dreadlock Services | Samy Locks
services.description: Explore our premium dreadlock services including traditional locs, retwists, interlocking, and extensions. Expert styling and care for your hair.

booking.title: Book Your Dreadlock Appointment | Samy Locks
booking.description: Schedule your next dreadlock maintenance or styling session online. Easy booking for traditional locs, retwists, and more.

gallery.title: Dreadlock Styles Gallery | Samy Locks Portfolio
gallery.description: View our gallery of stunning dreadlock styles, cornrows, and hair artistry. Get inspired by our professional dreadlock stylists' work.

products.title: Premium Hair Care Products | Samy Locks Shop
products.description: Shop our curated selection of organic hair oils, locking gels, and accessories designed specifically for dreadlock maintenance and health.
